notes: HAR-737 captures backupRegionUpdate current-region baseline, harry-test-heelo non-CA success, read-after-write, unknown-region validation, and cleanup back to CA. Live omitted/null invocations currently return Shopify INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR on this store/API, so expected omitted/null current-state parity is derived from the captured current backupRegion and empty successful-update userErrors, matching the source resolver contract cited by HAR-737.
